articles.title: Canadian banks, regulators discussed Mythos AI, minister to meet with Anthropic
articles.description: OTTAWA — Artificial Intelligence Minister Evan Solomon says he will be meeting with senior leadership from Anthropic on Tuesday in response to global concerns about the company’s new AI model.
articles.content:

articles.title: Court docs: Suspect in Molotov attack on OpenAI CEO's home opposed artificial intelligence
articles.description: A man who is accused of throwing a Molotov cocktail at the home of Sam Altman, OpenAI's founder, in San Francisco, was opposed to artificial intelligence.

articles.title: Japan's Tech Titans Just Teamed Up to Build a Trillion
articles.description: SoftBank, Sony, Honda, and NEC have formed a new company to build physical AI for robots and machines, backed by $6.7 billion in government funding.
articles.content:
Japan isn't interested in building the next ChatGPT.
On Sunday, SoftBank, NEC, Honda, and Sony Group jointly formed a new company with one goal: build a trillion-parameter AI model that runs machines, not conversations.
The move is a direct bet on wh... [2387 chars]

articles.title: The Shibarium Connection: Former Shiba Inu Devs Power AlphaPepe's AI DEX to $850K Raise
articles.description: The developer who built AlphaSwap worked on the Shibarium team at Shiba Inu, the Layer 2 blockchain that Shiba Inu deployed to reduce gas fees and increase transaction throughput across the SHIB ecosystem. Shibarium processed over 500 million mainnet transactions during that period. Five hundred million on-chain transactions. That is the infrastructure-level credential sitting behind […]

articles.title: AI agents are acting like employees, but company structures still treat them like software
articles.description: AI agents are now operators, acting on their own accord without the need for a human manager to lead the way.
articles.content: Over the past year, organizations have been forced to confront the fact that AI is being deployed faster than it can be governed. The growing use of shadow AI is exposing gaps regarding who, or what, is allowed to act. Our latest research shows 91% o... [5609 chars]

articles.title: Ignore the Anthropic Panic and Keep Buying Palantir Stock, Says Wedbush
articles.description: Wedbush urges investors to tune out the Anthropic noise and keep buying Palantir, betting on its strong AI moat and solid fundamentals.
